name: reflect
description: Reflect on your own working session — the one reflexive, cross-cutting family. Four summoned skills: catchup/park work the cursor (read current state / write HANDOFF.md), observe distills selected durable learning, and retrace reconstructs a long development arc as provenance-labeled causal stages before rendering a user-corrected interactive alignment artifact. A plain chronological recap needs no skill; summarize remains retired (ADR-079). Read-only except each writer's bounded artifact. Cross-project, language-agnostic.
